item.description: President Trump discussed his call with FIFA President Gianni Infantino over Folarin Balogun's red card in the World Cup game against Bosnia and Herzegovina and his request to review the penalty.

media:content.media:title: 'That wasn't a foul': Trump shares details of call with FIFA president
media:content.media:description: President Trump discussed his call with FIFA President Gianni Infantino over Folarin Balogun's red card in the World Cup game against Bosnia and Herzegovina and his request to review the penalty.

item.title: 'That wasn't a foul': Trump shares details of call with FIFA president

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: The scenes were hard to watch inside MetLife Stadium as Brazilian fans were seen in tears toward the end of loss to Norway.

media:content.media:text: A group of soccer fans wearing the colors of Brazil's team reacting with dismay.
media:content.media:description: Brazil fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: Endrick splayed on his stomach on the soccer pitch, his eyes closed.
media:content.media:description: Brazil fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: A triptych image of Team Brazil players.
media:content.media:description: Brazil fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: A soccer fan covers his face with his t-shirt while reacting to gameplay.
media:content.media:description: Brazil fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

item.title: Brazil’s loss to Norway leaves players and fans distraught and searching for answers

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Haaland delivered both goals as Norway defeated five-time champion Brazil and advanced to the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time in its history.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland raises both arms in celebration during a world cup game.
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland celebrating with teammates after scoring Norway's second goal against Brazil in East Rutherford, N.J., on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: on-field action during a world cup match.
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland celebrating with teammates after scoring Norway's second goal against Brazil in East Rutherford, N.J., on Sunday.

item.title: Erling Haaland cements superstar status, scores twice in Norway’s 2-1 win over Brazil

item.description: El Coloso de Santa Úrsula se transformó: Harry Kane y sus compañeros se acercaron con la afición inglesa y con Liam Gallagher de fondo, miles de voces entonaron juntas el tema de Oasis que se ha convertido en un himno para los "Tres Leones" en el Mundial.

media:content.media:title: ¡Wonderwall retumbó en el Azteca! Así festejó Inglaterra su pase a cuartos tras eliminar a México
media:content.media:description: El Coloso de Santa Úrsula se transformó: Harry Kane y sus compañeros se acercaron con la afición inglesa y con Liam Gallagher de fondo, miles de voces entonaron juntas el tema de Oasis que se ha convertido en un himno para los "Tres Leones" en el Mundial.

item.title: ¡Wonderwall retumbó en el Azteca! Así festejó Inglaterra su pase a cuartos tras eliminar a México

item.description: Tras liderar el triunfo de Inglaterra con dos goles en el Estadio Azteca, el mediocampista del Real Madrid se deshizo en elogios para México, reconoció su fortaleza en el Mundial y aseguró que fue un placer jugar en un escenario y un país tan increíble.

media:content.media:title: Bellingham mostró todo su respeto por México: "Es un equipo muy fuerte, juega con mucho corazón"
media:content.media:description: Tras liderar el triunfo de Inglaterra con dos goles en el Estadio Azteca, el mediocampista del Real Madrid se deshizo en elogios para México, reconoció su fortaleza en el Mundial y aseguró que fue un placer jugar en un escenario y un país tan increíble.

item.title: Bellingham mostró todo su respeto por México: "Es un equipo muy fuerte, juega con mucho corazón"

item.description: Javier Aguirre, Edson Álvarez resaltaron la entrega del equipo mexicano, al tiempo que Tuchel y Kane celebraron la sufrida victoria.

media:content.media:title: El orgullo y pundonor de vencedores y vencidos en Voces del Mundial
media:content.media:description: Javier Aguirre, Edson Álvarez resaltaron la entrega del equipo mexicano, al tiempo que Tuchel y Kane celebraron la sufrida victoria.

item.title: El orgullo y pundonor de vencedores y vencidos en Voces del Mundial

item.description: Erling Haaland firmó un doblete para que Noruega eliminara 2-1 a Brasil en una de las mayores sorpresas del Mundial. Inglaterra también avanzó a cuartos tras resistir con diez jugadores y vencer 3-2 a México en el Estadio Azteca.

media:content.media:title: Noruega sorprende al mundo e Inglaterra avanza con sufrimiento
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland firmó un doblete para que Noruega eliminara 2-1 a Brasil en una de las mayores sorpresas del Mundial. Inglaterra también avanzó a cuartos tras resistir con diez jugadores y vencer 3-2 a México en el Estadio Azteca.

item.title: Noruega sorprende al mundo e Inglaterra avanza con sufrimiento

item.description: Tras el triunfo de los europeos sobre el "Tricolor", el defensa se dijo maravillado con el Estadio Azteca, la afición y reconoció la dificultad de enfrentar a los de Javier Aguirre con su gente, asegurando que fue el mejor estadio en el que ha jugado.

media:content.media:title: Dan Burn: "México ha sido la prueba más difícil para Inglaterra en el Mundial"
media:content.media:description: Tras el triunfo de los europeos sobre el "Tricolor", el defensa se dijo maravillado con el Estadio Azteca, la afición y reconoció la dificultad de enfrentar a los de Javier Aguirre con su gente, asegurando que fue el mejor estadio en el que ha jugado.

item.title: Dan Burn: "México ha sido la prueba más difícil para Inglaterra en el Mundial"

item.description: Dunga y Diego Lugano coinciden en reconocer que la eliminación de Brasil en la Copa Mundial no es una sorpresa.

media:content.media:title: El Análisis Experto es para la sublime actuación de Haaland y Noruega
media:content.media:description: Dunga y Diego Lugano coinciden en reconocer que la eliminación de Brasil en la Copa Mundial no es una sorpresa.

item.title: El Análisis Experto es para la sublime actuación de Haaland y Noruega

item.description: Noruega sorprendió al eliminar 2-1 a Brasil con un doblete de Erling Haaland. Inglaterra también avanzó tras vencer 3-2 a México, con dos goles de Jude Bellingham y otro de Harry Kane.

media:content.media:title: ¡Noruega da el batacazo e Inglaterra resiste ante México para avanzar!
media:content.media:description: Noruega sorprendió al eliminar 2-1 a Brasil con un doblete de Erling Haaland. Inglaterra también avanzó tras vencer 3-2 a México, con dos goles de Jude Bellingham y otro de Harry Kane.

item.title: ¡Noruega da el batacazo e Inglaterra resiste ante México para avanzar!

item.description: La jornada del 5 de julio en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 será recordada por la gran actuación de Noruega, Inglaterra y México, además de los miles de aficionados que les acompañan.

media:content.media:title: La pasión y el color la aportaron los hinchas de Noruega, Brasil, Inglaterra y México
media:content.media:description: La jornada del 5 de julio en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 será recordada por la gran actuación de Noruega, Inglaterra y México, además de los miles de aficionados que les acompañan.

item.title: La pasión y el color la aportaron los hinchas de Noruega, Brasil, Inglaterra y México

item.description: Casi afónico, el delantero Harry Kane aplaude la victoria obtenida bajo un número de circunstancias que el equipo de ‘los Tres Leones’ tuvo en contra: la resiliencia, el equipo y su rendimiento hace de este un partido de locos, afirmó.

media:content.media:title: Kane: “Toda la ocasión, el equipo, todo contra nosotros; encontramos la manera”
media:content.media:description: Casi afónico, el delantero Harry Kane aplaude la victoria obtenida bajo un número de circunstancias que el equipo de ‘los Tres Leones’ tuvo en contra: la resiliencia, el equipo y su rendimiento hace de este un partido de locos, afirmó.

item.title: Kane: “Toda la ocasión, el equipo, todo contra nosotros; encontramos la manera”

item.description: Con doble de Jude Bellingham y uno más de Harry Kane de penal, el equipo inglés dio cuenta de México que luchó en todo momento, pero no pudo con el cerco defensivo.

media:content.media:title: Inglaterra aguanta con diez hombres y vence a México y se cita con Noruega en cuartos de final
media:content.media:description: Con doble de Jude Bellingham y uno más de Harry Kane de penal, el equipo inglés dio cuenta de México que luchó en todo momento, pero no pudo con el cerco defensivo.

item.title: Inglaterra aguanta con diez hombres y vence a México y se cita con Noruega en cuartos de final

item.description: Funeral processions began for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei months after he was killed in the United States airstrike that started the war. Iran hasn’t offered an explanation for the absence of the new leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, and a senior Iranian official denied to NBC News media reports that he was badly injured or disfigured in the attack the killed his father. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Absent From His Father’s Funeral
media:content.media:description: Funeral processions began for Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei months after he was killed in the United States airstrike that started the war. Iran hasn’t offered an explanation for the absence of the new leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, and a senior Iranian official denied to NBC News media reports that he was badly injured or disfigured in the attack the killed his father. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Absent From His Father’s Funeral

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: Prince Harry is heading back to the U.K., but he won’t stay at Buckingham Palace. A new dispute over his accommodation is sparking further speculation about the acrimonious relationship between King Charles III and his youngest son.

media:content.media:text: Prince Harry, Duke Of Sussex Visits Kyiv Security Forum
media:content.media:description: Prince Harry in Kyiv, Ukraine, on April 23.

item.title: Prince Harry’s U.K. trip sparks fresh dispute over Buckingham Palace stay

item.description: A Russian missile and drone attack left at least seven people dead hours after Ukrainian President Zelenskyy warned of an imminent attack on Kyiv. The latest large-scale attack comes says after Russian missile and drone strikes killed at least 31 people in the Ukrainian capital.

media:content.media:title: Russia launches deadly wave of missiles and drones on Kyiv
media:content.media:description: A Russian missile and drone attack left at least seven people dead hours after Ukrainian President Zelenskyy warned of an imminent attack on Kyiv. The latest large-scale attack comes says after Russian missile and drone strikes killed at least 31 people in the Ukrainian capital.

item.title: Russia launches deadly wave of missiles and drones on Kyiv

item.description: Some of the guests of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Madison Square Garden wedding ceremony are sharing a glimpse of what it was like inside the star-studded event. Exclusive details reveal more about the couple’s “emotional” wedding vows and describe how the two turned the venue into a “secret garden” that showcases key moments throughout their lives and relationship. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Guests Spill Wedding Secrets
media:content.media:description: Some of the guests of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Madison Square Garden wedding ceremony are sharing a glimpse of what it was like inside the star-studded event. Exclusive details reveal more about the couple’s “emotional” wedding vows and describe how the two turned the venue into a “secret garden” that showcases key moments throughout their lives and relationship. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports for TODAY.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Guests Spill Wedding Secrets

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: England reserve Jordan Henderson injured himself as his team celebrated their World Cup win over Mexico by singing the Oasis classic “Wonderwall.”

media:content.media:text: Declan Rice, left, and Dan Burn stand around Jordan Henderson who is crumpled on the ground on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Declan Rice, left, and Dan Burn of England try to help their teammate Jordan Henderson, center, who was injured amid the celebrations after winning the match against Mexico on July 5.

item.title: England’s Jordan Henderson suffers serious injury during ‘Wonderwall’ celebration after World Cup win

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: Hamas on Monday announced the dissolution of the body that has governed the Gaza Strip for nearly two decades as the militant group prepares to hand over power to a technocratic committee backed by President Donald Trump.

media:content.media:description: Hamas fighters during a hostage handover in Khan Younis, southern Gaza on Feb. 20, 2025.

media:content.media:text: Hamas militants hand over three Israeli hostages on February 8, as part of the fifth exchange under a fragile Gaza ceasefire, with 183 prisoners held by Israel due to be released later in the day.
media:content.media:description: Hamas militants during a hostage handover in Deir al-Balah, central Gaza, in 2025.

item.title: Hamas dissolves Gaza governing body ahead of power transfer

item.dc:creator: Lauren Wilson
Daniella Silva
item.description: The company behind AI “actor” Tilly Norwood announced Monday it’s working on a full-length film starring its controversial creation, which has been blasted by a major actors union as “devaluing human artistry.”

media:content.media:description: AI-generated actress Tilly Norwood.

item.title: Tilly Norwood, AI ‘actor’ denounced by actors union, to star in feature film

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
Monica Alba
item.description: President Donald Trump confirmed that he asked FIFA to review U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun’s red card suspension before the organization reversed its decision, allowing the star striker to participate in Monday night’s match.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump, seated at his Oval Office desk, shaking the hand of Gianni Infantino who stands next to him.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump and FIFA President Gianni Infantino shake hands in the Oval Office on March 7, 2025.
Folarin Balogun of the U.S. fouls Tarik Muharemovic of Bosnia on July 1.

item.title: Trump says he asked FIFA to review U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun’s suspension

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: Ten-man England earned its greatest World Cup victory on foreign soil by defeating co-host Mexico at Estadio Azteca, banishing the ghost of Diego Maradona’s “Hand of God” in the same stadium 40 years ago.

media:content.media:text: England players celebrate, hands raised in the air, on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: England players celebrate the victory and qualification for the quarter finals during the World Cup match against Mexico on July 5.

media:content.media:text: on-field action during a world cup match.
media:content.media:description: England players celebrate the victory and qualification for the quarter finals during the World Cup match against Mexico on July 5.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: England wins in the Azteca

item.dc:creator: Adela Suliman
item.description: Prince Harry is heading back to the U.K., but he won’t stay at Buckingham Palace. A new dispute over his accommodation is sparking further speculation about the acrimonious relationship between King Charles III and his youngest son.

media:content.media:text: Prince Harry, Duke Of Sussex Visits Kyiv Security Forum
media:content.media:description: Prince Harry in Kyiv, Ukraine, on April 23.

item.title: Prince Harry’s U.K. trip sparks fresh dispute over Buckingham Palace stay
